title: Air Volume Demonstration for Children
author: Unknown
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.vh5e386

steps.title: Take a large bowl and fill...
steps.instruction: Take a large bowl and fill with water, almost to the top.

steps.title: Get a dry cup that can...
steps.instruction: Get a dry cup that can fully fit inside the bowl.

steps.title: Add tape to the bottom of...
steps.instruction: Add tape to the bottom of the cup (double-sided or rolled up to be sticky from both sides).

steps.title: Crumple a piece of napkin or paper towel
steps.instruction: Crumple a piece of napkin or paper towel.

steps.title: Insert the paper towel into the...
steps.instruction: Insert the paper towel into the cup, attaching to the bottom. The paper should be fully inside the cup, away from the open edge.

steps.title: Carefully push the cup, face down, into the bowl
steps.instruction: Carefully push the cup, face down, into the bowl. Do not tilt the cup.

steps.title: Submerge the cup fully, so the...
steps.instruction: Submerge the cup fully, so the water covers the top of the cup.

steps.title: Carefully lift the cup, removing it...
steps.instruction: Carefully lift the cup, removing it from the bowl without tilting. Once removed, tilt slightly and let the water drip off.

steps.title: With your dry hand, remove the...
steps.instruction: With your dry hand, remove the paper towel from the cup.
